calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Sep-11-2013 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: 9:28am
Judge Pro Tem David Commins, clerk Jean Kong, nothing reported, D525.
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. No appearance by appellant; respondent, Muhammad Salem appears as pro per with brother - Falah Salem. Parites, previously sworn, testify in the narrative and respond to questions from Judge Commins.

Court inform the respondent that no appearance by the appellant, therefore, the appeal will be dismissed and the Small Claims judgement will stands. Case Adjourned.

9:30am
matter is submitted.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Jul-16-2013 Judgment Entered

DEFENDANT'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Jul-16-2013 Judgment Entered

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Jun-12-2013 Continued To Jul-15-13 At 03:30 P.M. In Dept 506

Off Calendar Jun-12-2013 Continued To Jul-15-13 At 03:30 P.M. In Dept 506

Off Calendar May-14-2013 Continued To Jun-12-13 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 506
